claim_boundary: This is a contract-owned CathAction real-data benchmark output built from audited frozen-model outputs. It is a real benchmark surface for v0.1, not a clinical validation claim.

source_manifest.claim_boundary: This is a bounded CathAction human-segmentation subset check. It tests whether the frozen-panel ordering is stable enough to justify paper-outline repair, but it is not the final DIAS + CathAction construct-validity estimate across all stressors.

models.checkpoint_note: Original checkpoint loads directly on this host.
models.source: Meta Segment Anything ViT-B checkpoint used in S1/S3.

models.checkpoint_note: CPU-mapped copy of official CUDA-serialized checkpoint; original SHA256 34b34b78c1d18cb8c6bf84cf9c00e135d6d6c965699f3c0e31ef1bc9dcb5be74.
models.source: MedSAM repository README checkpoint folder; official file was CPU-mapped locally for non-CUDA loading.

models.checkpoint_note: Official checkpoint loaded on MPS in one-frame S2c candidate smoke.
models.source: Meta Segment Anything official README ViT-L checkpoint URL.

surface.split_rule: Use the full audited nonempty image-mask-pair universe for the v0.1 CathAction tier: 5,225 nonempty pairs after excluding 58 empty-mask pairs from 5,283 paired records.
surface.task: catheter and guidewire human segmentation masks
